description_long: This hamburger features a soft, plain golden-brown bun on top and bottom, enclosing a thick layer of melted orange cheese draped over a beef patty. Crisp green lettuce and slices of tomato are visible beneath the patty, with several pickle slices layered above the cheese. The bun appears pillowy and slightly glossy, with no sesame seeds present. The cheese is slightly melted and oozes over the patty and toppings, while the lettuce and tomato add a fresh, vibrant contrast. The overall appearance is appetizing, with the ingredients stacked neatly and visibly from all sides.
description: A classic hamburger with a plain golden-brown bun, melted cheese, beef patty, lettuce, tomato, and pickles, stacked in a visually appealing arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hamburger's smooth top bun, melted cheese, and a hint of lettuce and tomato peeking out from the bottom.
description_view_1: This side highlights the thick cheese layer, crisp lettuce, and a more pronounced view of the lower bun's edge.
description_view_2: Pickle slices are clearly visible above the cheese, with lettuce spilling out from the side and a glimpse of tomato beneath.
description_view_3: A prominent view of the lettuce and tomato layers, with cheese melting over the patty and a clear look at the bottom bun.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Pickles are layered above the cheese, which is melted over the patty; lettuce and tomato are stacked beneath the patty, with the toppings distributed evenly and visibly from the sides.
